core_mechanism: a persistent random walk with self-propulsion: short-time ballistic (drift-dominated) motion at a fixed speed that decorrelates over a characteristic persistence time into long-time ordinary diffusion with an enhanced effective diffusion coefficient
brief_reason: The abstract reports directed motion at short times with a well-defined velocity crossing over at longer times to a random walk with a substantially enhanced diffusion coefficient, which is exactly the ballistic-to-diffusive crossover of a persistent (self-propelled) random walk.
